overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night in a video game. The player moves from an open intersection, under an overpass, along a waterfront path, and approaches a brightly lit neon food stall. Heavy rain creates reflective wet surfaces and atmospheric haze throughout the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with traffic lights and wet pavement

events.description: turns left at the intersection onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet intersection and turning left onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing on the sidewalk corner facing the street

entered.detail: rain-soaked asphalt with yellow road markings reflecting street lights
tall pole with illuminated traffic signals showing red lights
multi-story building with illuminated windows and signage
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark rainy sky
tall street light casting yellow illumination on the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy night at an urban intersection with wet asphalt reflecting the street lights. The camera moves forward and turns left onto a sidewalk, passing a pedestrian standing at the corner. Palm trees are visible in the distance against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under highway overpass with construction barriers

events.description: enters covered area under the overpass, lighting becomes significantly darker
passes a brightly lit shop entrance with warm interior lighting on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass past orange construction barriers

entered.detail: concrete underside of the highway overpass creating a roof overhead
wall with large black and white graffiti art depicting a face
orange and white striped barriers lining the left side of the path
small shop with metal shutters and bright interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a highway overpass into a darker, sheltered area with concrete walls and ceiling. Construction barriers line the left side while a graffiti-covered wall and a small lit shop appear on the right. The rain is still audible but less visible in this covered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with metal railings and palm trees

events.description: exits the covered overpass back into the open rain
passes a dark-colored sedan parked on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path passing a parked vehicle

entered.detail: metal safety railing running along the left side of the walkway
dark sedan parked on the right side of the path
tall tower with illuminated signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens back into the rainy night along a waterfront promenade. Metal railings line the left side while palm trees stand on the right. The camera passes a parked car and continues toward a distant neon-lit tower visible through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront plaza approaching neon-lit food stall with stairs

events.description: approaching bright cyan neon lights from the food stall ahead
ascends concrete stairs near the waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs toward the neon-lit building while rain continues to fall

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the food stall entrance

entered.detail: building with bright cyan neon trim and illuminated signage
set of stairs leading up to the plaza level
futuristic aircraft flying overhead in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a brightly lit food stall with vivid cyan neon lights, ascending stairs near the waterfront. A flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance. The rain creates reflections on the concrete plaza as the bright neon illumination grows stronger.

scene_state.functional_zone: immediate vicinity of bright neon food stall with cyan signage

events.description: very close to bright neon lights, strong cyan illumination reflecting on wet surfaces

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance of the neon-lit food stall, passing by the bright signage

notable_agents.action: person standing near the food stall counter

entered.detail: intense cyan neon lights and signage on the food stall facade
metal barrier fencing near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves very close to the food stall, where intense cyan neon lights illuminate the rainy surroundings. The bright signage reflects off the wet pavement. A person stands near the stall counter as the camera approaches the entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk city, moving from a dark urban intersection toward the intense glow of a neon food stall. It begins at a wet asphalt intersection, gliding past a pedestrian and distant palm trees before turning left onto a sidewalk. As the camera moves forward, the open street gives way to the sheltered gloom of a highway overpass, passing construction barriers and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then opens back into the rainy night along a waterfront promenade lined with metal railings, moving past a parked car toward a distant neon tower. Finally, the camera ascends stairs toward a brightly lit plaza where a flying vehicle passes overhead, drawing closer to a food stall until the vivid cyan neon lights dominate the reflections on the wet pavement.
